name: util_admin_invoices_overview_html
_purpose: Vista agregada de facturas (proveedores). GET /webhook/admin-invoices-overview con header x-api-key. 4 KPI cards (pending review + amount, approved sin pagar + amount, paid 30d + amount, disputed). Tabla pending por categoria, tabla historica por gremio (con avg amount), top 20 pending mas antiguas primero coloreado por dias.
_complementa_a: cron_invoice_approval_followup (digest diario), agent_financial_tracker (entrada via OCR Vision)

nodes.name: Load Invoice Stats
nodes._query_summary: json con totals + by_category (pending) + by_trade (historico) + recent_pending
